Unnamed Locations

Current Map

  • Battle Royale
  • OG

Overview

This page is under construction.
Please refrain from editing the page if another user is actively doing so as to avoid edit conflicts.
This page is a stub.
Some content on this page may be missing or incomplete, you can help by expanding it!

Unnamed Locations are a type of location in Fortnite: Battle Royale. Unnamed locations are unique, in that they exist as clear Points of Interest on the map, but do not have a label on the map (Named Locations) nor do they even inform the player they are in the vicinity of one (Landmarks).

As Landmarks were only first added in Chapter 2: Season 1, they are considered as the replacement for Unnamed Locations. However, many notable locations without names still exist in Chapter 2 and beyond, and as such are listed here.

Defining an Unnamed Location

Defining an Unnamed Location[]

Unnamed Locations are defined by having a signature point of interest, but the game does not highlight it as a landmark or named location. As such, many of these unnamed landmarks are unofficially named by the community, and do not have proper names in-game (although some may be labelled by external media). Unnamed Locations can be anything from a singular prop, to entire sets of buildings, all as long as the game doesn't specifically name them. This does not count either Spawn Island nor The Ocean, as both are key game features as well as Locations, and neither are inherently present on the main islands themselves.

All of these Locations are found on the Island Asteria.

Landmark Name Image Season Added Status at the end of Chapter 4: Season 4 Desription
Explorer Convoy Chapter 4: Season 3 Removed A convoy of Titano Mudflaps carrying The Explorers' equipment.
Explorer Watchtower Chapter 4: Season 3 Present A tall watchtower owned by The Explorers that oversees the Jungle Biome.
Slone's Tank Camp Chapter 4: Season 3 Present The remnants of Slone's Titan Tank with a small camp set next to it.

All of these Locations are found on the Island Artemis.

Landmark Name Image Season Added Status at Fracture

All of these Locations are found on the Island Apollo.

Landmark Name Image Season Added Status at The End Description
IO Hatches Chapter 2: Season 1 Present Hatches owned by Imagined Order that lead to The Bridge
Holly House Chapter 2: Season 1 Present A house with a garden located on the top of a hill near Holly Hedges.
Agent Peely's House Chapter 2: Season 2 Present A log cabin with a secret basement.
Astronomical Stage Chapter 2: Season 2 Removed A small satge where Travis Scott's Astronomical concert was hosted.
GHOST Big Shots Chapter 2: Season 2 Present A small Big Shots cafe owned by GHOST.
Skye's Campsites Chapter 2: Season 2 Removed Campsites that Skye made while exploring the Island.
Skye's Sword Sites Chapter 2: Season 2 Removed
Ancient Spaceship Chapter 2: Season 3 Removed A small futuristic spacesghip belonging to Deo and Siona that crash landed on the Isalnd.
Trash Fish Island Chapter 2: Season 3 Removed A small island made of sea trash that looks like a fish.
Whirlpools Chapter 2: Season 3 Removed When entering a whirlpool, you would be boosted up and enter skydive mode. You could then redeploy your glider whenever you wanted.
IO Elevators Chapter 2: Season 5 Removed Elevators owned by Imagined Order that also lead to The Bridge
Bat Shack Chapter 2: Season 6 Present A small shack from Batman/Fortnite: Zero Point Comics where Batman Zero store all his equipment.
Downed Black Helicopter Chapter 2: Season 6 Removed A downed Imagined Order's helicopter.
Stealthy Stronghold Chapter 2: Season 7 as an Unnamed Location Present A base built by the Imagined Order that housed Predator before being abandoned. Imagined Order set up a satelite dish there.
Corrupted Areas Chapter 2: Season 8 Present Areas corrupted by Cubes.
Guava Fort Chapter 2: Season 8 Present A fort that Loopers and the Rebooted Cube "Belvin" used to fight back against The Last Reality and The Cube Queen.
IO Outposts Chapter 2: Season 8 Present Small outposts set up by Imagined Order.
IO Road Checkpoints Chapter 2: Season 8 Present Road checkpoints set up by Imagined Order.
Wasted Woods Hideout Chapter 2: Season 8 Present A small yellow shipping container leading to a small hideout in Wasted Woods.
